zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle van Gistel於1368年出生在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫度澤勒時，她的父親Roger de Ghistelles30歲，母親Margaretha van Dudzeele34歲。她於1385年與Baron Arnould de Gavre VI在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫度澤勒結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和11個女兒的父母。她去世於1438年1月18日在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫利享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle van Gistel于1368年出生在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫度澤勒时，她的父亲Roger de Ghistelles30岁，母亲Margaretha van Dudzeele34岁。她于1385年与Baron Arnould de Gavre VI在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫度澤勒结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和11个女儿的父母。她去世于1438年1月18日在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫利享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gistel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Danish: from a personal name based on ancient Germanic gīsil ‘pledge, hostage, noble youth’ (see Giesel ).

variants.name: Giesel
meanings: German: from the personal name Giesel, a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names with the first element gīsil ‘pledge, hostage, noble offspring’. In ancient and medieval ancient Germanic society, the younger children of kings and princes were sometimes sent to be brought up at the court of a neighboring ruler, as a pledge of peace between the two nations or clans. Thus, the male personal name Gisil and its feminine equivalent Gisela mean both ‘pledge’ and ‘noble offspring’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle van Gistel was born in 1368, in Dudzele, West Flanders, Belgium, her father, Roger de Ghistelles, was 30 and her mother, Margaretha van Dudzeele, was 34. She married Baron Arnould de Gavre VI in 1385, in Dudzele, West Flanders, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 11 daughters. She died on 18 January 1438, in Schorisse, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle van Gistel est née en 1368, à Dudzele, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, son père, Roger de Ghistelles, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaretha van Dudzeele, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Baron Arnould de Gavre VI en 1385, à Dudzele, Flandre occidentale, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 11 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 janvier 1438, à Schorisse, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle van Gistel 1368 in Dudzele, West-Flandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Ghistelles 30 und ihre Mutter Margaretha van Dudzeele 34. Sie hat 1385 in Dudzele, West-Flandern, Belgien Baron Arnould de Gavre VI geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 11 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Januar 1438 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Schorisse, Ostflandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle van Gistel è nata il nel 1368 nel Dudzele, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, sua padre, Roger de Ghistelles, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Margaretha van Dudzeele, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Baron Arnould de Gavre VI nel 1385, nel Dudzele, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 11 figlie. Morì il 18 gennaio 1438, nel Schorisse, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle van Gistelが1368年にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンダドズエルで生まれた時，父Roger de Ghistellesは30歳，母Margaretha van Dudzeeleは34歳であった。1385年にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンダドズエルでBaron Arnould de Gavre VIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼女は1438年1月18日にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンスチオリッセで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle van Gistel(이)가 1368년 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 드드즈일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Ghistelles(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaretha van Dudzeele(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1385년 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 드드즈일에서 Baron Arnould de Gavre VI(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1438년 1월 18일 벨기에 스트-블라아더 슈리스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle van Gistel nasceu em 1368, em Dudzele, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, seu pai, Roger de Ghistelles, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha van Dudzeele, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Baron Arnould de Gavre VI em 1385, em Dudzele, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 11 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1438, em Schorisse, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle van Gistel родилась в 1368 г. в местности дудзель, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Roger de Ghistelles было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaretha van Dudzeele, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baron Arnould de Gavre VI в 1385 г. в местности дудзель, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 11 дочерей. Она умерла 18 января 1438 г. в местности щаурисс, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle van Gistel nació en 1368, en Dudzele, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, su papá, Roger de Ghistelles, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaretha van Dudzeele, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Baron Arnould de Gavre VI en 1385, en Dudzele, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 11 hijas. Murió el 18 de enero de 1438, en Schorisse, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 70 años.
